---
title: "clean data compatible with the multiverse analysis"
output: html_document
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
---

## creating a processed data frame - the input data is already pre-processed, the pre-processing is not yet added to the repository.

## libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```

## import data
```{r}
processed_1 <- read.csv("104_processed_data.csv")
```

## selecting relevant variables, filtering correct trials 
```{r}
processed_2 <- processed_1 %>% 
  select(rt, subj_code, congruency, prev_congruency, correct, prev_correct) %>% 
  mutate(congruency = ifelse(congruency == "congruent", 0.5, -0.5), 
         prev_congruency = ifelse(prev_congruency == "congruent", 0.5, -0.5)) ## %>% 
  ## filter(
  ##  correct != 0, 
  ##  prev_correct != 0
  ## ) %>% 
  ## select(-correct, -prev_correct)
```

## write.csv
```{r}
write.csv(processed_2, "raw_1.csv")
```
